zh.lifeSummary: 當Rachel Rowlett於大約1653年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可時，她的父親John Rowlett54歲，母親Mary Bray37歲。她於1666年4月27日與Godfrey Ragsdale II在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可布里斯托 帕里什結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1715年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可布里斯托 帕里什享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rachel Rowlett于大约1653年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可时，她的父亲John Rowlett54岁，母亲Mary Bray37岁。她于1666年4月27日与Godfrey Ragsdale II在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可布里斯托 帕里什结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1715年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可布里斯托 帕里什享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rowlett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a diminutive of the personal name Rol(l)and. See Rowland and compare Rolling .
English: from a pet form of the personal name   Ralph  . Compare   Rawling  .
English: from a pet form of the personal name Rolf. See Rolfe and compare Rolling .

variants.name: Rowlette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Collette, Lucien.
Variant of   Rowlett  , a surname of English or French origin.

variants.name: Roulette
meanings: French: unexplained. In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of Roulet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

variants.name: Rowland
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Rollant, Rolant, Rolent, Roulent (ancient Germanic Hrodland, Rodland, from hrōd ‘glory’ + land ‘land’), introduced into England by the Normans. It was made famous by French romances about Roland, the most famous of the peers of Charlemagne who was killed at Roncesvalles in AD 778. Although widely used across post-Conquest England (along with Oliver, the name of Roland's companion), it seems to have been restricted to particular gentry families and was never popular. Compare Roland .

English: habitational name from Rowland (Derbyshire) or Rowland Wood in Slinfold (Sussex). The Derbyshire placename derives from Old Norse rá ‘roe, roe buck’ or rá ‘land mark, boundary’ + lúndr ‘small wood, grove’. The Sussex placename probably derives from Middle English roughe ‘rough’ + lond ‘land’ (Old English rūh, land).
English: in northern England and perhaps elsewhere, perhaps a post-medieval variant of   Rawling  . Compare   Rawlinson  ,   Rollinson  .

nameMeanings.name: Rachel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘ewe’ in Hebrew), borne by the beloved wife of Jacob and mother (after long barrenness) of Joseph (Genesis 28–35) and of Benjamin, at whose birth she died. In the Middle Ages and subsequently this was regarded as a characteristically Jewish name, but it is now also popular among Gentiles.

variants.name: Rachelle
meanings: Elaborated form of   Rachel  , as if from French, but actually a recent coinage in English.

en.lifeSummary: When Rachel Rowlett was born about 1653, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, John Rowlett, was 54 and her mother, Mary Bray, was 37. She married Godfrey Ragsdale II on 27 April 1666, in Bristol Parish, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1715, in Bristol Parish, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rachel Rowlett est née environ 1653, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Rowlett, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Mary Bray, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Godfrey Ragsdale II le 27 avril 1666, à Bristol Parish, Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1715, à Bristol Parish, Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 63 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Rachel Rowlettが約1653年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコで生まれた時，父John Rowlettは54歳，母Mary Brayは37歳であった。1666年4月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコブリストル パーイッシュでGodfrey Ragsdale IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1715年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコブリストル パーイッシュで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rachel Rowlett(이)가 대략 1653년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Rowlett(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Bray(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1666년 4월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코 브리스톨 파리시에서 Godfrey Ragsdale II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1715년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코 브리스톨 파리시에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Godfrey Ragsdale II em 27 de abril de 1666, em Bristol Parish, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rachel Rowlett родилась около 1653 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Rowlett было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Bray, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Godfrey Ragsdale II 27 апреля 1666 г. в местности бристол пэриш, хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1715 г. в местности бристол пэриш, хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет.
